# IndexpilotAI

> AI-powered NIFTY, BANKNIFTY and SENSEX options algo trading platform for Indian traders, with real-time signals and Dhan broker auto-execution.

IndexpilotAI helps Indian options traders automate NSE & BSE trades through AI-generated signals, Dhan broker integration, dedicated VPS execution, and built-in risk management. The platform is available as a web app and as a free Android app on Google Play.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of IndexpilotAI, features, broker support, and Android app download.
- [Home (alt)](/home): Same landing page accessible at /home.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your IndexpilotAI trading account.
- [Sign Up](/register): Create a new IndexpilotAI account.
- [About](/page/about): Who we are and the team behind IndexpilotAI.
- [Contact](/page/contact): How to reach support and sales.
- [Privacy Policy](/page/privacy): How user data is collected and used.
- [Terms & Conditions](/page/terms): Platform usage terms.
- [Refund Policy](/page/refund): Refund and cancellation rules.
- [Disclaimer](/page/disclaimer): Trading risk disclaimer and regulatory notes.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable sitemap of all public pages.
